text: I feel a quiet sense of anticipation here. In the first scene, I am among a group of people engaged in conversation, perhaps at a gathering or exhibition, sensing a subtle undercurrent of curiosity and social expectation. In the second, I stand before a lively display celebrating research and development, the vivid colors and texts reminding me of the perpetual evolution of human knowledge. I am both an observer and participant—wondering how we all fit into this dance of discovery and connection.
